rules.name: Monitor CX Risk Score
rules.reason: High customer experience risk score detected, indicating potential customer dissatisfaction.

rules.name: Evaluate Support Ticket Volume
rules.reason: A high volume of support tickets suggests issues that may be affecting customer satisfaction.

rules.name: Assess Customer Rating
rules.reason: Average customer rating is lower than expected, indicating potential product issues.

rules.name: Check NPS Values
rules.reason: NPS below expected threshold could suggest declining customer loyalty.

rules.name: Evaluate ROAS
rules.reason: Return on ad spend is lower than expected, affecting campaign profitability.

rules.name: Seek Positive Review Sentiment
rules.reason: Negative review sentiment could harm brand perception.

rules.name: Monitor Refund Rate
rules.reason: Elevated refund rates may indicate issues with product quality or customer expectations.

rules.name: Check Ad Status
rules.reason: Campaign ads should be active to ensure continuity of marketing efforts.

rules.name: Track Social Reach Impact
rules.reason: Low social reach may impact brand visibility and acquisition rates.

rules.name: Ensure Inventory Confirmation
rules.reason: Inventory not confirmed, posing a risk for stock-outs and customer dissatisfaction.

rules.name: Evaluate Sentiment Consistency
rules.reason: Inconsistent customer sentiment may indicate emerging issues or dissatisfaction.

rules.name: Confirm Platform ROAS Consistency
rules.reason: Significant difference between platform-reported and true ROAS can lead to misinformed ad spend decisions.
